name: Oatmeal Orange Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F (375°F). Grease cookie sheets.
Sift flour, salt, and sugar into a mixing bowl.
Add fat, eggs, vanilla extract, and orange rind. Blend thoroughly.
Fold in oats and coconut.
Drop dough from a teaspoon, about 2 inches apart, onto the cookie sheets.
Flatten with a knife dipped in cold water.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes. Remove immediately.
